points.text: Ethyreal Bio emerged from stealth with $101M funding to advance ETHY-001, a monoclonal antibody targeting the TSHR receptor for Graves disease and thyroid eye disease.

Sanofi halted its Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial for riliprubart, an anti-inflammatory monoclonal antibody, in chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy (CIDP) after an independent board deemed success unlikely.

Sanofi's riliprubart (SAR445088), an IgG4 humanized monoclonal antibody targeting activated C1s, failed the interim analysis of the Phase 3 MOBILIZE study in chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy (CIDP) due to insufficient efficacy.

Over 100 monoclonal antibodies are currently approved globally with hundreds more in clinical development, driving the need for improved single B cell discovery platforms to reduce downstream attrition.

Zenas BioPharma — Obexelimab — Immunoglobulin G4-Related Disease (IgG4-RD) — Phase 3 INDIGO trial met primary and all key secondary endpoints with statistically significant results; BLA submitted to FDA in May 2026.

Edesa Biotech — Paridiprubart — Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) with respiratory distress — First-in-class anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody showed 32% relative reduction in mortality at 28 days in 101-patient post hoc analysis.

CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Alzheimer's Disease — First patient dosed in Phase 2a study in collaboration with Weill Cornell Medicine; leronlimab is a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting the CCR5 receptor.
Climb Bio — CLYM116 — IgA nephropathy (IgAN) — Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody Phase 1 data showed favorable safety profile in healthy volunteers at doses up to 320 mg with no unexpected findings.

Zenas Biopharma — Obexelimab — IgG4-related disease — Humanized bifunctional monoclonal antibody demonstrated 56% reduction in flare risk vs placebo at 52 weeks in INDIGO trial presented at EULAR 2026.

Sanofi halted the Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial for riliprubart, an anti-inflammatory drug, after an independent monitoring board deemed success unlikely in patients with chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy (CIDP).

Sanofi — Riliprubart — Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial stopped due to futility; interim analysis indicated insufficient efficacy with no safety signals.

Sanofi — Riliprubart — CIDP — IgG4 humanized monoclonal antibody selectively inhibiting activated C1s in the classical complement pathway; VITALIZE Phase 3 study in IVIg-treated patients remains under evaluation.

Edesa Biotech reported positive exploratory data for paridiprubart, a first-in-class anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody, showing a 32% relative reduction in 28-day mortality in acute kidney injury (AKI) patients with respiratory distress.

CytoDyn dosed the first patient in a Phase 2a study evaluating leronlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting the CCR5 receptor, for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease in collaboration with Weill Cornell Medicine.
Edesa Biotech secured $3.5 million in a private placement of common shares led by CEO Par Nijhawan and healthcare-focused investors to fund clinical operations.

Climb Bio — CLYM116 — Immune-mediated diseases — Initial Phase 1 safety data for anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody demonstrated favorable profile in healthy volunteers at doses up to 320 mg with no unexpected safety findings.

Zenas Biopharma — Obexelimab — IgG4-related disease — Humanized bifunctional monoclonal antibody targeting CD19 and FcRIIb demonstrated 56% reduction in flare risk vs placebo at 52 weeks in INDIGO trial data presented at EULAR 2026.
Université de Montréal researchers developed monoclonal antibodies targeting SLAMF6 to block immune exhaustion and restore T-cell anti-tumor activity in preclinical mouse models.
Université de Montréal researchers led by Dr. André Veillette developed monoclonal antibodies targeting SLAMF6 to block immune exhaustion and enhance T-cell anti-tumor activity in mouse models.

Genmab/AbbVie — Epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly) — Relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma — Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 trial showed 95% ORR and 83% CR vs 79% ORR and 50% CR for lenalidomide/rituximab control; HR for PFS 0.21.

Sanofi — Isatuximab-irfc (Sarclisa) — Multiple myeloma — EU approved subcutaneous on-body injector formulation based on Phase 3 IRAKLIA trial noninferiority data (ORR 71.7% vs 70.5% IV) and reduced infusion reactions (1.5% vs 25%).
Ethyreal Bio — ETHY-001 — Graves disease / Thyroid eye disease — Launched with $101M; monoclonal antibody designed to block TSHR receptor; long-lasting subcutaneous injection format.
Sanofi — Riliprubart — Chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy (CIDP) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial stopped early by independent monitoring board due to futility; no safety concerns identified.
Sanofi — Riliprubart — Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial stopped following interim analysis indicating unlikely efficacy; no safety signals identified.
Zenas BioPharma — Obexelimab — IgG4-RD — Phase 3 INDIGO trial met primary endpoint; significant reduction in glucocorticoid use and toxicity; BLA submitted to FDA May 2026.

Edesa Biotech — Paridiprubart — Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) — Anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody associated with 32% relative mortality reduction at 28 days in 101-patient exploratory analysis of AKI/ARDS cohort.
CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Alzheimer's Disease — Phase 2a study initiated; leronlimab is a first-in-class humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor.
Climb Bio — CLYM116 — IgA nephropathy — Phase 1 safety data presented at ERA Congress 2026; partner Beijing Mabworks Biotech to initiate dosing in IgAN patients in Phase 2 study in Q3 2026.

Zenas Biopharma — Obexelimab — IgG4-related disease — Global multicenter randomized double-blind placebo-controlled INDIGO trial showed 56% flare risk reduction at 52 weeks; no new safety signals reported.

Ethyreal Bio — ETHY-001 — Graves disease / Thyroid Eye Disease — Monoclonal antibody designed to block TSHR receptor; raised $101M in initial funding; formulated as long-lasting subcutaneous injection.

Sanofi — Riliprubart — Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial stopped for futility; independent monitoring board found no safety concerns but low probability of success.

Sanofi — Riliprubart — Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial terminated following interim analysis showing unlikely efficacy; no significant financial cost incurred.

Edesa Biotech — Paridiprubart — Acute Kidney Injury (AKI) with Respiratory Distress — Phase 3 exploratory analysis of 101 patients showed 32% relative reduction in 28-day mortality vs standard of care; data presented at 63rd ERA Congress.
CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Alzheimer's Disease — First patient dosed in Phase 2a study conducted in collaboration with Weill Cornell Medicine targeting CCR5 receptor.
Climb Bio — CLYM116 — IgA nephropathy (IgAN) — Phase 1b data presented at ERA 2026; partner Beijing Mabworks Biotech expects to initiate dosing in IgAN patients for Phase 2 study in Q3 2026.

Zenas Biopharma — Obexelimab — IgG4-related disease — Phase 3 INDIGO trial results: 56% flare risk reduction vs placebo at 52 weeks; no new safety signals reported for the CD19/FcRIIb co-engaging monoclonal antibody.

Université de Montréal — Anti-SLAMF6 monoclonal antibodies — Cancer immunotherapy — Preclinical study demonstrated increased T-cell activation, reduced exhaustion, and strong anti-tumor responses in mice; mechanism involves blocking SLAMF6 self-binding.

Université de Montréal — Anti-SLAMF6 monoclonal antibodies — Cancer immunotherapy — Preclinical mouse studies demonstrated increased T-cell activation, reduced exhaustion, and strong anti-tumor responses compared to existing approaches.
Genmab/AbbVie — Epcoritamab-bysp — Relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma — Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 subgroup analysis: 96% ORR and 84% CR in patients <70 years; HR for PFS 0.19 vs control.
Sanofi — Isatuximab-irfc — Multiple myeloma — EU approval granted for subcutaneous on-body injector (OBI) across all existing IV indications following EMA CHMP positive opinion.
Ethyreal Bio — Monoclonal antibody development for immune diseases — ETHY-001 (TSHR blocker) — $101M seed funding secured; targeting Graves disease and thyroid eye disease.
Sanofi — Late-stage monoclonal antibody pipeline optimization — Riliprubart (anti-inflammatory mAb) — Phase 3 trial terminated for CIDP indication; potential blockbuster status now in doubt.
Sanofi — Clinical program restructuring — Riliprubart (IgG4 humanized monoclonal antibody) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE study terminated; VITALIZE Phase 3 study in IVIg-treated CIDP patients under evaluation.
Zenas BioPharma — Commercialization of IgG4-RD therapy — Obexelimab (FcγRIIb/CD19 dual-targeting monoclonal antibody) — Phase 3 INDIGO trial positive; BLA submitted to FDA May 2026.

Edesa Biotech — Host-directed anti-inflammatory therapy — Paridiprubart (anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody) — Phase 3 exploratory data in AKI/ARDS showing 32% mortality reduction; presentation at 63rd ERA Congress.

CytoDyn — Advancing humanized monoclonal antibody leronlimab across oncology and neurodegenerative indications — Leronlimab (CCR5-targeting mAb) — Phase 2a in Alzheimer's Disease initiated; also advancing in metastatic triple-negative breast cancer and colorectal cancer.

Climb Bio — Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody development — CLYM116 — Global rights outside Greater China; advancing Phase 1 in healthy volunteers with partner Beijing Mabworks Biotech initiating Phase 2 in China Q3 2026.

Zenas Biopharma — B-cell activation inhibition via bifunctional mAb — Obexelimab — INDIGO trial results presented at EULAR 2026 showing 56% flare risk reduction in IgG4-related disease; no new safety signals.
Ethyreal Bio — Monoclonal antibody development for immune diseases — ETHY-001 — $101M seed funding secured; targeting TSHR overactivation in Graves disease and thyroid eye disease.
Sanofi — Pipeline optimization following late-stage failure — Riliprubart — Phase 3 trial discontinued June 10, 2026, marking a setback for a therapy previously viewed as a potential blockbuster.
Sanofi — Complement pathway inhibition strategy — Riliprubart (SAR445088) — Phase 3 MOBILIZE trial stopped; VITALIZE Phase 3 study in IVIg-treated CIDP patients ongoing pending evaluation.

Edesa Biotech — Host-directed therapeutic development for immuno-inflammatory diseases — Paridiprubart (anti-TLR4 mAb) — Raised $3.5M private placement; advancing Phase 3 program in AKI/ARDS with positive mortality signals.
CytoDyn — CCR5-targeted monoclonal antibody commercialization — Leronlimab — Expanding indications from oncology (mTNBC, CRC) to neurodegenerative disease (Alzheimer's) with new Phase 2a initiation.
Climb Bio — Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody development — CLYM116 — Global rights held outside Greater China; Phase 1 studies ongoing in Australia and China with dosing expansion planned for Q3 2026.

Zenas Biopharma — Development of bifunctional monoclonal antibody therapy — Obexelimab — INDIGO trial data presented at EULAR 2026 showing 56% flare risk reduction in IgG4-related disease; mechanism involves co-engagement of CD19 and FcRIIb.

Genmab/AbbVie — Advancing bispecific T-cell engager (anti-CD20/CD3) monoclonal antibody — Epcoritamab-bysp — Phase 3 EPCORE FL-1 demonstrated superiority over standard chemo-immunotherapy in follicular lymphoma.
Sanofi — Expanding subcutaneous delivery options for anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody — Isatuximab-irfc — EU approval of OBI formulation achieved with 70% patient satisfaction vs 53.4% for IV.

ETHY-001 — Mechanism: TSHR receptor blockade — Phase: Preclinical/Early development — Population: Graves disease and thyroid eye disease patients — Design: Long-lasting subcutaneous monoclonal antibody.

Riliprubart — Mechanism: Anti-inflammatory monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (MOBILIZE) — Population: CIDP patients refractory to standard-of-care — Outcome: Trial stopped for futility by independent board.

Riliprubart — Mechanism: IgG4 humanized monoclonal antibody selectively inhibiting activated C1s in the classical complement pathway — Phase: 3 (MOBILIZE) — Population: CIDP patients refractory to standard-of-care — Comparator: Not specified in termination notice — Results: Study stopped due to insufficient efficacy; no safety signals identified.

Obexelimab — Mechanism: FcγRIIb/CD19 dual-targeting monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 — Population: IgG4-Related Disease — Comparator: Placebo — Results: Met primary endpoint; significant reduction in flare burden, glucocorticoid use, and toxicity; safety profile comparable to placebo.

Paridiprubart — Mechanism: Anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (exploratory analysis) — Population: Acute Kidney Injury with respiratory distress (101 patients) — Comparator: Standard of Care — Results: 32% relative reduction in mortality at 28 days; improvements in MAKE30 composite endpoint.

Leronlimab — Mechanism: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor — Phase: 2a — Population: Alzheimer's Disease patients — Comparator: Not specified in source — Endpoints/Results: First patient dosed in study with Weill Cornell Medicine.

CLYM116 — Mechanism: Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1 — Population: Healthy volunteers — Comparator: None stated — Results: Favorable safety profile at doses up to 320 mg; no unexpected safety findings.

Obexelimab — Mechanism: Humanized bifunctional monoclonal antibody co-engaging CD19 and FcRIIb (CD32b) to inhibit B-cell activation — Phase: 3 (INDIGO) — Population: IgG4-related disease — Comparator: Placebo — Results: 56% reduction in flare risk at 52 weeks; no new safety signals.

ETHY-001 — Mechanism: TSHR receptor blockade — Phase: Preclinical/Startup — Population: Graves disease and thyroid eye disease patients — Comparator: N/A — Status: Designed as long-lasting subcutaneous injection to halt disease progression.

Riliprubart — Mechanism: Anti-inflammatory (specific target not explicitly stated as monoclonal in source) — Phase: 3 — Population: CIDP patients refractory to standard-of-care — Comparator: Not applicable (trial stopped for futility) — Results: Independent monitoring board determined trial unlikely to succeed.

Riliprubart — Mechanism: IgG4 humanized monoclonal antibody inhibiting activated C1s in classical complement pathway — Phase: 3 (MOBILIZE terminated, VITALIZE ongoing) — Population: CIDP patients refractory to standard-of-care or IVIg-treated — Comparator: Not specified in termination notice — Results: MOBILIZE stopped for futility; no safety signals identified.

Paridiprubart — Mechanism: Anti-TLR4 monoclonal antibody blocking toll-like receptor 4 inflammation — Phase: 3 (exploratory analysis) — Population: AKI patients with ARDS (n=101) — Comparator: Standard of Care — Results: 32% relative reduction in 28-day mortality; improved MAKE30 composite endpoint.

Leronlimab — Mechanism: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor — Phase: 2a — Population: Alzheimer's disease patients — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoint: Safety and tolerability; first patient dosed June 2026.

CLYM116 — Mechanism: Anti-APRIL monoclonal antibody — Phase: 1b — Population: Healthy volunteers and IgA nephropathy patients — Comparator: None stated — Results: Favorable safety profile up to 320 mg; translational modeling supports potential for substantial IgA reduction and less frequent dosing.

Obexelimab — Mechanism: Bifunctional monoclonal antibody co-engaging CD19 and inhibitory receptor FcRIIb (CD32b) to inhibit B-cell activation — Phase: 3 (INDIGO) — Population: IgG4-related disease — Comparator: Placebo — Results: 56% reduction in flare risk at 52 weeks; no new safety signals.

Anti-SLAMF6 monoclonal antibodies — Mechanism: Block SLAMF6 self-binding to prevent T-cell exhaustion — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Mouse tumor models — Comparator: Existing PD1/PDL1 inhibitors — Results: Superior anti-tumor response; increased durable immune cell numbers.

Anti-SLAMF6 monoclonal antibodies — Mechanism: Blockade of SLAMF6 self-binding to prevent T-cell exhaustion signals — Phase: Preclinical (mice) — Population: Tumor-bearing mice — Results: Increased durable immune cells, reduced exhausted T cells, and enhanced tumor attack efficacy.

Epcoritamab-bysp — Mechanism: Bispecific anti-CD20/CD3 T-cell engager — Phase: 3 (EPCORE FL-1) — Population: Relapsed/refractory follicular lymphoma — Comparator: Lenalidomide/rituximab — Results: 95% ORR, 83% CR, PFS HR 0.21.

Isatuximab-irfc — Mechanism: Anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (IRAKLIA) — Population: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma — Comparator: Intravenous formulation — Results: Noninferior ORR (71.7% vs 70.5%), 1.5% systemic infusion reactions vs 25% IV.
Ethyreal Bio — Secured $101M in funding to launch operations and advance ETHY-001 monoclonal antibody program for immune diseases.
Zenas BioPharma — Regulatory filing — Obexelimab BLA for IgG4-RD — Submitted to FDA in May 2026 following Phase 3 INDIGO trial success.
Edesa Biotech — Capital raise — $3.5 million private placement of common shares — Led by CEO and healthcare-focused investors announced June 11, 2026.
Ethyreal Bio — $101M initial funding round — ETHY-001 — Capital raised to advance monoclonal antibody program targeting TSHR for thyroid-related immune diseases.
Sanofi — Clinical trial termination — Riliprubart MOBILIZE study — No significant financial cost incurred; 2026 financial guidance unchanged.
Edesa Biotech — Secured $3.5 million private placement of common shares led by CEO Par Nijhawan and healthcare-focused investors to support clinical development.
CytoDyn — Initiated strategic collaboration with Weill Cornell Medicine — Leronlimab — Phase 2a study in Alzheimer's disease launched with first patient dosed.
